prompt:

Photorealistic candid lifestyle photography with real pores, fine skin texture, natural flyaway hair, realistic fabric folds, plausible hands, reflections, shadows, and perspective. Tasteful mature sensuality through visible shoulders or collarbones and fitted opaque daywear. No lingerie, no underwear styling, no transparent fabric, no exposed breasts, no excessive cleavage, no nudity, no fetish styling, no provocative pose. No other people, no text, no logo, no brand, no watermark.
